rationale.R1.2: Walked the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (unsupported claim about prior router-quality audits).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
